prompt: Create a low-resolution VHS camcorder still from 2004 showing a strange paranormal event in a suburban Kmart parking lot beside a playground. The scene is shot from behind at eye level on an overcast day, with a pale blue-gray sky, leafless trees, parked cars, beige big-box store facade, and a large red “Kmart” sign on the right. In the upper center of the frame, a young girl with long dark hair wearing a plain white knee-length dress floats unnaturally high above the ground, viewed from behind, arms slightly away from her sides and feet dangling. On the ground there are exactly 7 adult onlookers facing her: 1 person in a beanie near the yellow playground slide on the left, 1 large hooded figure in the foreground center, 1 person in a tan jacket near center, 1 dark-clothed person farther back near the cars, 1 person holding a bright pink shopping bag, 1 person in a blue plaid shirt, and 1 hooded person on the far right. Include a playground structure on the left with a cream roof, yellow slide, blue posts, gravel or mulch ground, parking lot light poles, and cars in the background. Add authentic analog video artifacts: horizontal scan lines, interlacing, slight blur, muted colors, blue tint, compression noise, mild chromatic aberration, and a black-bordered camcorder feel. Overlay large white blocky VHS timestamp text in the lower left reading “PM 12:16:42” on the first line and “OCT 24 2004” on the second line. Make the image feel like found footage of a supernatural levitation incident, realistic and unsettling, not cinematic or polished. Customizable elements: levitating subject is a young girl with long dark hair in a white dress, store sign is Kmart, timestamp is PM 12:16:42 / OCT 24 2004, setting is suburban Kmart parking lot beside a playground, visual format is low-resolution 2004 VHS camcorder still.

promptZh: 创作一张 2004 年低分辨率 VHS 摄像机截图，展现郊区 Kmart 停车场旁游乐场发生的超自然怪事。场景为阴天，从后方平视视角拍摄，背景是灰蓝色的天空、枯树、停放的汽车、米色的大型商场外墙，右侧有醒目的红色“Kmart”标志。画面上方中央，一名留着长黑发、身穿纯白色及膝连衣裙的年轻女孩在离地极高处不自然地悬浮，背对镜头，双臂微张，双脚垂下。地面上有 7 名成年围观者正对着她：左侧黄色游乐场 Slides 附近有一名戴冷帽的人，前景中央有一名穿着连帽衫的高大身影，中心附近有一名穿棕褐色夹克的人，后方靠近汽车处有一名穿深色衣服的人，一名手提亮粉色购物袋的人，一名穿蓝色格子衬衫的人，以及最右侧一名戴连帽衫的人。左侧包含一个带有奶油色屋顶、黄色 Slides 和蓝色支柱的游乐设施，地面为碎石或覆盖物，背景有停车场灯杆和汽车。添加真实的模拟视频伪影：水平扫描线、隔行扫描、轻微模糊、柔和色彩、蓝色调、压缩噪点、轻微色差，以及带有黑色边框的摄像机质感。左下角叠加大型白色块状 VHS 时间戳文本，第一行显示“PM 12:16:42”，第二行显示“OCT 24 2004”。使图像呈现出超自然悬浮事件的伪纪录片感，真实且令人不安，而非电影化或精致的风格。可自定义元素：悬浮主体为 a young girl with long dark hair in a white dress，商店标志为 Kmart，时间戳为 PM 12:16:42 / OCT 24 2004，场景为 suburban Kmart parking lot beside a playground，视觉格式为 low-resolution 2004 VHS camcorder still。
